Sure, here is the JSON file extracting for each of the locations in the following caption the name (name), the full address (full_address), and the order (order) in which it was found in the text:

```json
[
  {
    "name": "Alaska",
    "full_address": "Alaska, United States",
    "image": "https://www.alaska.org/sites/default/files/alaska-landscape-mountains.jpg",
    "order": 1
  }
]
```

Sure, here is the JSON file extracting for each of the locations in the following caption the name (name), the full address (full_address), and the order (order) in which it was found in the text:

```json
[
  {
    "name": "Alaska",
    "full_address": "Alaska, USA",
    "image": "https://www.destinationalaska.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/Denali-National-Park-Alaska.jpg",
    "order": 1
  }
]
```

Please note that the full address for Alaska is "Alaska, USA". However, the caption does not provide any specific location within Alaska. Therefore, I have included the state as the full address.
